description: KataGo enrichment configuration — all tunable thresholds for puzzle analysis.

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Removed report_generation section (Work Stream K sunset). HTML report feature removed; log-viewer standalone JSONL dashboard replaces it.

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Calibration resilience & flexibility. Changed randomize_fixtures default true→random (broader coverage by default). Added restart_every_n=10 (engine restart crash mitigation for Intel iGPU OpenCL 0xC0000005). run_calibration.py now reads fixture_dirs/sample_size/seed from config (--input-dir overrides). Deterministic mode via randomize_fixtures=false + seed.

changelog.author: 4-expert-consensus
changelog.changes: Tsumego threshold fine-tuning (4-expert consensus). Tightened: t_good 0.05→0.03, t_bad 0.15→0.12, t_disagreement 0.10→0.07. Depth: entry.solution_min_depth 2→3, strong.solution_max_depth 28→24, curated_pruning.min_depth 2→3. Visits: refutation_visits 100→200, continuation_visits 125→200, max_total_tree_queries 50→65, candidate_max_count 5→6. Detection: score_lead_seki_max 2.0→5.0, score_delta_ko 5.0→7.0, branch_disagreement_threshold 0.10→0.07. Calibration: sample_size 5→20. Code fix: adaptive visit allocation now compounds with corner/ladder edge-case boosts (was overriding them since v1.24).

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Log-report generation (Work Stream K). Added report_generation section: enabled (default false), execution_profile (lab|production). Supports automated markdown report generation from enrichment logs.

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Feature activation Phase 2 (20260319-PGR-4b). PI-2 visit_allocation_mode=adaptive, PI-7 branch_escalation_enabled=true, PI-8 multi_pass_harvesting=true, PI-9 player_alternative_rate=0.15. Budget constraint C7: max_total_tree_queries=50 cap, continuation_visits < branch_visits, player_alternative_rate ≤ 0.20, branch_disagreement_threshold ≥ 0.05. Constraint C9: thresholds conserved.

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Feature activation Phase 1a-1c (20260318-1400). Phase 1a: PI-1 ownership_delta_weight=0.3, PI-3 score_delta_enabled=true, PI-12 best_resistance_enabled=true. Phase 1b: PI-5 noise_scaling=board_scaled, PI-6 forced_min_visits_formula=true. Phase 1c: PI-10 use_opponent_policy=true, PI-11 surprise_weighting=true. Constraint C9: thresholds conserved. Phase 2 deferred to v1.24 pending PGR-4b budget verification.

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Production readiness: Added quality_weights section (GQ-1 panel-validated qk formula). Weights: trap_density 40%, avg_refutation_depth 30%, correct_move_rank 20%, policy_entropy 10%. Visit-count gate at rank_min_visits=500 (C4). Config-driven per C3.

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Refutation tree quality improvements Phase D (PI-11). Added: calibration.surprise_weighting (surprise-weighted calibration, default false), calibration.surprise_weight_scale (scale factor for surprise weighting, default 2.0). Weight = 1 + scale * |T0_winrate - T2_winrate|. Higher surprise = higher weight in threshold optimization. Feature-gated with current-behavior default (disabled = uniform weighting).

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Refutation tree quality improvements Phase C (PI-7/PI-8/PI-12). Added: solution_tree.branch_escalation_enabled/branch_disagreement_threshold (branch-local disagreement escalation, default disabled/0.10), refutations.multi_pass_harvesting/secondary_noise_multiplier (diversified root candidate harvesting, default disabled/2.0), refutations.best_resistance_enabled/best_resistance_max_candidates (best-resistance line generation, default disabled/3). All feature-gated with current-behavior defaults.

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Refutation tree quality improvements Phase B (PI-2/PI-5/PI-6/PI-9). Added: solution_tree.visit_allocation_mode/branch_visits/continuation_visits (adaptive visit allocation, default fixed), refutation_overrides.noise_scaling/noise_base/noise_reference_area (board-size-scaled Dirichlet noise, default fixed), refutations.forced_min_visits_formula/forced_visits_k (forced minimum visits, default disabled), solution_tree.player_alternative_rate/player_alternative_auto_detect (player-side alternative exploration, default rate=0.0/auto_detect=true). All feature-gated with current-behavior defaults.

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Refutation tree quality improvements Phase A (PI-1/PI-3/PI-4/PI-10). Added: refutations.ownership_delta_weight (ownership delta composite scoring, default 0.0), refutations.score_delta_enabled/score_delta_threshold (score-lead delta filter, default disabled/5.0), ai_solve.model_by_category (model routing by puzzle complexity, default empty), teaching.use_opponent_policy (opponent-response teaching comments, default false). All feature-gated with current-behavior defaults.

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Score-based trap density (KaTrain-inspired) replacing |winrate_delta| approximation. Configurable floor (trap_density_floor) and score normalization cap (score_normalization_cap). Elo-anchor hard gate for level validation using KaTrain CALIBRATED_RANK_ELO (MIT licensed, github.com/sanderland/katrain). Covered range: elementary→high-dan.

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Added benson_gate section (RC-3). Feature flag and min_contest_stones threshold for Benson unconditional life gate (G1) and interior-point death gate (G2). Config-driven enable/disable for safe rollout.

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Kishimoto-Mueller search optimizations (KM-01..KM-04). Added solution_tree: simulation_enabled, simulation_verify_visits (KM-01 Kawano simulation), forced_move_visits, forced_move_policy_threshold (KM-03 forced-move fast-path), transposition_enabled (KM-02 position-hash cache). Added difficulty.normalization.max_resolved_depth_ceiling and structural_weights.proof_depth (KM-04 proof-depth signal, rebalanced weights 40/25/20/15 to 35/22/18/15/10). Added TreeCompletenessMetrics counters: simulation_hits/misses, transposition_hits, forced_move_count, max_resolved_depth.

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: AI-Solve unified enrichment (ai-solve-enrichment-plan-v3). Added ai_solve section with 10 sub-configs: thresholds (DD-2 delta-based TE/BM/BM_HO classification), confidence_metrics (DD-6 annotations not gates), solution_tree (DD-1 category-aware depth profiles for entry/core/strong, DD-3 branching/budget), seki_detection (DD-12 early-exit heuristic), goal_inference (DD-8 multi-signal), edge_case_boosts (DD-12 corner/ladder visit multipliers), alternatives (DD-7 co-correct three-signal, DD-10 human_solution_confidence), calibration (DD-9 stratified model-aware), observability (DD-11 disagreement sink + batch summaries). Feature-gated: enabled=false by default. Zero behavior change when ai_solve key is absent.

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Consolidate output/calibration/benchmark paths (Q10). Added paths section — all runtime artifacts centralized under .lab-runtime/. Logs, KataGo logs, outputs, calibration results all config-driven.

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Performance & config-driven enrichment (Plan 010). Added: models (name indirection), tree_validation, technique_detection, ko_detection, teaching, difficulty.normalization, calibration, logging additions, refutations.pv_mode. Renamed lab_mode → deep_enrich. Removed dual_engine section (absorbed into deep_enrich + models). ~45 hardcoded thresholds migrated to config.

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Phase P.2: Enable level_mismatch.threshold 99→3. Overwrite YG when KataGo estimate differs by ≥3 level steps. Works for all collections — purely signal-driven, no collection-specific hardcoding. (Section retired in v1.15 — JSON section removed, threshold=3 retained as _MISMATCH_THRESHOLD constant in sgf_enricher.py.)

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Phase S.G: Threshold tuning (ADR D36). Widened elementary max_score 56→62 and shifted subsequent thresholds to accommodate KataGo-primary formula (80% AI signals). Expert panel S.0 identified policy dilution on 19x19 boards inflating elementary scores.

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Phase S.4: Added ko_analysis section (ADR D31). Per-ko-type rules override (tromp-taylor for ko puzzles) and analysisPVLen override (30 for ko puzzles). Inspired by KataGo PR #261.

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Phase S.2: Added lab_mode section for max-effort enrichment (ADR D23/D30). b28c512 model, 10K visits, 8 symmetries, no time limit. Supersedes progressive escalation for lab context.

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Phase R calibration fixes: added refutations.locality_max_distance (Chebyshev filter), added difficulty.structural_weights (SGF-structural formula replacing KataGo-signal formula).

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Added level_mismatch section for policy-aligned enrichment (ADR-007). Threshold TBD — needs Go professional calibration. (Section retired in v1.15 — JSON section removed, threshold=3 kept as code constant _MISMATCH_THRESHOLD in sgf_enricher.py.)

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Cycle 2 validation fixes — rejected_not_in_top_n 5→20 (b18 ranks correct tsumego moves at 6-35); add winrate_rescue_auto_accept=0.85 (auto-accept when winrate≥0.85 even if not in top-N).

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Calibration cycle 1 fixes — candidate_min_policy 0.02→0.0 (b18 gives near-zero policy to tsumego moves); refutation_visits 200→100; candidate_max_count 8→5; score_to_level_thresholds shifted +20-25 points (policy floor ~25 + refutation floor ~25 = effective minimum score ~56).

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Upgrade quick_model b10→b18; rebalance difficulty weights (R2: policy 40→25, depth 25→35, refutations 15→25); add refutation_escalation (retry with higher visits when 0 refutations found); lower refutation thresholds (candidate_min_policy 0.05→0.02, delta_threshold 0.15→0.08, refutation_visits 100→200); add sparse_position detection (R1).

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: Added quality_gates (acceptance_threshold, difficulty_match_threshold) and analysis_defaults (default_max_visits, puzzle_region_margin, visits_escalation_multiplier, visits_escalation_addend) — all thresholds now config-driven.

changelog.author: unknown
changelog.changes: quick_visits 200→500 for better quick-model accuracy on complex puzzles.

changelog.author: initial
changelog.changes: Initial config with ownership, difficulty, refutation, and escalation thresholds.

ownership_thresholds.description: Ownership thresholds for life/death validation (D8). Range: -1.0 (dead) to +1.0 (alive).

difficulty.description: Difficulty scoring formula weights and policy-to-level mapping (D4, D22). Structural signals dominant (35%), trap density (20%), complexity (15%), policy+visits reduced (15+15=30%) to mitigate PUCT collinearity.

policy_to_level.description: Tier 0.5 policy-only difficulty mapping (D4). Higher prior = easier puzzle.

structural_weights.description: SGF-structural difficulty sub-weights (Phase R.3). These are weighted within the structural component (45% of composite). Sum to 100 internally.

normalization.description: Difficulty normalization ceilings (Plan 010, D41). From estimate_difficulty.py.

refutation_escalation.description: Escalation settings when 0 refutations found on first pass. Retries with higher visits and relaxed thresholds to ensure refutation trees are always built.

sparse_position.description: Sparse position detection (R1). Auto-escalate to referee for low-density boards where the quick model struggles with global context.

escalation._deprecated: Superseded by lab_mode (ADR D30, Phase S.2). In lab context, fixed max-effort visits replace progressive escalation. This section is preserved for FUTURE PRODUCTION PIPELINE use only — lab code ignores it when deep_enrich.enabled=true.
escalation.description: Progressive visit escalation thresholds (D6 — superseded by D30 in lab context).

quality_gates.description: Configurable acceptance thresholds for performance tests and calibration.

analysis_defaults.description: Default analysis parameters used across query builders and models when no override is provided.

visit_tiers.description: Visit tier configuration for graduated analysis depth. Higher tiers used for complex positions or disagreement resolution.

T0.purpose: Policy snapshot for technique pre-classification and quick reject

T1.purpose: Standard analysis for correct move validation and difficulty estimation

T2.purpose: Deep analysis for refutation generation and complex positions

T3.purpose: Referee for disagreement resolution and escalation endpoint

ai_solve.description: AI-Solve unified enrichment (ai-solve-enrichment-plan-v3, DD-1 through DD-12). Always active.

deep_enrich.description: Deep enrichment settings (Plan 010, D47). Behavior-descriptive naming; location-agnostic for mainline migration. b18 at 2K visits = ~13,600 Elo. b28 reserved for referee escalation only.
deep_enrich._note: When deep_enrich.enabled=true, enrichment bypasses dual-engine escalation and uses a single engine at max visits. Single engine with config-driven referee escalation.

ko_analysis.description: Ko-aware analysis configuration (Phase S.4, ADR D31). Per-ko-type overrides for KataGo rules and PV length. Motivated by KataGo PR #261: superko rules prevent exploration of ko recapture sequences. Using simple ko rules (tromp-taylor) lets the search tree include ko fights.

models.description: Model name indirection (Plan 010, D42). Code references labels only, never filenames directly. No .py file may reference a model filename or architecture string directly.

test_fast.label: test_fast
test_fast.description: Smallest supported model for fast integration tests. Not for production analysis.

test_smallest.label: test_smallest
test_smallest.description: Smallest model for smoke tests and basic integration validation. Not for accuracy-sensitive analysis.

benchmark.label: benchmark
benchmark.description: b10c128 (~7MB, ~9400 Elo) — benchmark model for performance comparison tests.

test_defaults.description: Shared defaults for integration/performance tests. Centralizes magic numbers that were duplicated across test files.

tree_validation.description: Deep solution tree validation thresholds (Plan 010, D44). Currently hardcoded in validate_correct_move.py.

technique_detection.description: Technique detection thresholds (Plan 010, D41). 16 thresholds from technique_classifier.py.

ko_detection.description: Ko detection thresholds (Plan 010, D41). From ko_validation.py.

teaching.description: Teaching comment generation thresholds (Plan 010, D41). From teaching_comments.py.

elo_anchor.description: Elo-anchor hard gate for level validation (v1.17). Cross-checks composite difficulty level against KaTrain's CALIBRATED_RANK_ELO table (MIT licensed, github.com/sanderland/katrain). Overrides level when divergence exceeds threshold. Covered range: elementary (18k) through high-dan (5d).

paths.description: Centralized output directory paths (Q10). All runtime artifacts under .lab-runtime/. Relative to the puzzle-enrichment-lab tool root.

quality_weights.description: Panel-validated quality algorithm weights (GQ-1). qk = weighted sum of trap_density, avg_refutation_depth, correct_move_rank, policy_entropy. Config-driven per constraint C3.
